confirm.title: NSPanel HAUI devices discovered
confirm.description: Found {count} ESPHome device(s) running HAUI firmware: {names}. Add them to a new NSPanel HAUI hub? Devices stay disabled until you enable them in the HAUI Editor.

select_devices.title: Select NSPanel Devices
select_devices.description: Found {count} ESPHome device(s). {esphome_info} Pick which ones belong to this hub. Per-device and panel settings are managed in the NSPanel HAUI — HAUI Editor in the sidebar.

data_description.selected_devices: ESPHome devices discovered on your network.

abort.already_configured: A hub with this name is already configured
abort.already_in_progress: A hub configuration is already in progress
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one NSPanel HAUI hub is supported
abort.no_devices_found: No NSPanel HAUI devices were detected. Install the HAUI firmware on an ESPHome device first.

init.title: NSPanel HAUI Hub Settings
init.description: Runtime options for this hub. Per-device and panel settings live in the NSPanel HAUI — HAUI Editor.

data_description.update_interval: How often the integration polls panel state (5-300 s).
data_description.debug: Verbose debug logging for this hub.

open_panel.name: Open panel
open_panel.description: Navigate to a specific panel.  If wakeup is enabled the display wakes first.

panel.name: Panel
panel.description: Panel key or UUID to navigate to (e.g. 'alarm', 'grid_0').

wakeup.name: Wake up first
wakeup.description: Wake the display before opening the panel.

close_panel.name: Close panel
close_panel.description: Close the current panel and return to the previous or home panel.

wakeup.name: Wake up
wakeup.description: Wake the display and navigate to the wakeup or home panel.
